note: Advisory sandbox snapshot harness. Never PASS.
title: Prompt-Forge deterministic snapshot harness

subject.method: runs --demo --no-llm --json; strips volatile created_at; HOME=temp so no ~/.sina writes; --receipt never passed

what_it_proves: deterministic (--no-llm) demo output frozen as golden (created_at stripped)
hand-asserted invariants: used_llm=false, pipeline=prompt_forge, rebuild_risk finding present, facts.already_done non-empty
two runs identical (determinism); drift vs golden = INVESTIGATE not re-baseline
red-run canary: a used_llm=True assertion fails; golden drift detected
